description_long: This hotel is a rectangular, four-story building with a flat roof featuring multiple rooftop vents and a perimeter railing. The facade is adorned with evenly spaced windows, some of which have colorful balconies in shades of yellow, orange, and brown, adding visual interest to the otherwise neutral exterior. The ground floor includes several arched doorways, each protected by a small metal canopy, suggesting multiple entrances. The building's exterior walls are finished in a light beige color with darker brown accents around the windows and at the base and roofline. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from masonry or concrete, typical of mid-20th-century urban residential architecture. There is no visible signage indicating the hotel's name or branding.
description: A four-story rectangular hotel with a flat roof, multiple windows, and colorful balconies, featuring arched doorways with metal canopies and a neutral beige and brown facade.
description_view_0: The long side of the hotel is visible, showing rows of windows and several colorful balconies, but no entrances.
description_view_1: The short side of the hotel is shown, with windows but no balconies or entrances visible.
description_view_2: The opposite long side is visible, featuring multiple arched doorways with metal canopies, windows, and colorful balconies.
description_view_3: The other short side is shown, similar to view 1, with windows but no balconies or entrances.
